<uploaded_files>/app</uploaded_files>

# Forum digest: "A few statement rows get the wrong category or payee"

Collected from a user support thread. In every case the money moved correctly;
only the derived label is wrong - the category, the sub-tag, or the counterparty
name - and only on a handful of unusual row shapes. Three representative posts,
lightly anonymized, then a maintainer note.

---

**mango_saver** -
> Two rows on this month's statement look off. A credit whose reference note is
> nothing but a long all-numeric string used to show up as a cheque deposit and
> now it just reads as a generic transfer. Separately, my salary credit - whose
> narration is a bare numeric code and nothing else - has stopped picking up the
> salary sub-tag it always had.

**rk_ontheroad** -
> Mine is the name field, not the category. On transfers whose narration opens
> with a direction word ahead of the name, the counterparty now comes back
> empty or wrong. Ordinary transfers that don't open that way are still
> labelled fine; it's only that leading-keyword narration style.

**auditlens** -
> Bill transfers that use a slash-delimited reference are pulling the wrong
> payee. When the reference is laid out as four fields - a type, a sub-type, a
> numeric reference, then the payee name as the final field - the app is lifting
> the numeric reference into the name column instead of the actual name sitting
> at the end.

---

**Maintainer note.** Consolidating these. Each one sits on an edge form that
everyday rows rarely produce, which is why routine activity looks healthy and
nothing tripped in review. On top of the three above we reproduced one more in
the same family: an offsetting credit that arrives immediately after its
matching debit is being recorded as a bounce rather than the reversal it
really is.

The labeling logic is deterministic - the same row always maps to the same
label - so each complaint can be recreated from a single synthetic row and
chased to the exact rule at fault. Expect the faults to sit on boundaries and
structural offsets inside otherwise-correct rules, not in the common paths.

**Ask for engineering:** restore correct handling so these edge rows label
correctly again, without shifting any row that already comes out right. Success
is that the situations described here enrich correctly and nothing that is
currently correct changes.
I'll start by exploring the codebase to understand its structure and find the transaction labeling logic.

def clean_names(transactions, accountType, bank):

    app.logger.info("Assigning partyName for Current/Savings account")
    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("airtel\\s?-?dth|Airtel HD", na=False, case=False) , "Airtel DTH"],

from categorizationapp import app
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def purpose(transactions, accountType):

    app.logger.info("Assigning TransactionSubcategory for Saving/Current account")
    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains(REIMBURSE, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVING") , "REIMBURSEMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(SALARY, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.description.str.contains(NOT_SAL, na=False, case=False)==False) & (accountType=="SAVING") & transactions.amount.gt(1000)  & ~transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["UPI","IMPS"]) , "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("salary", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.description.str.contains(NOT_SAL, na=False, case=False)==False) & (accountType=="SAVING") & ~transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["UPI","IMPS"]), "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(SAL_IMPS, na=False, case=False) & (transactions.description.str.contains(NOT_SAL, na=False, case=False)==False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVING"), "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(SALARY_DISB, na=False, case=False) & (transactions.description.str.contains(NOT_SAL, na=False, case=False)==False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & (accountType=="CURRENT"), "SALARY_DISBURSED"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(INSUR_CLAIM, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.transactionCategory.ne("SALARY") , "INSURANCE_CLAIM"],
        [transactions.party2.str.contains(INSUR_CLAIM, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.transactionCategory.ne("SALARY") , "INSURANCE_CLAIM"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(RET_INVE, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["SALARY"])==False) & (transactions.amount.isin([1, -1])==False) , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.party2.str.contains(RET_INVE, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["SALARY"])==False) & (transactions.amount.isin([1, -1])==False) , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("INTEREST_ON_DEPOSIT"), "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains(LOAN, na=False, case=False) & (transactions.partyName.str.contains(NEGATE_LOAN, na=False, case=False)==False)  &  transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE","REVERSAL","SALARY","REFUND"])==False)  & transactions.amount.gt(200), "LOAN"],

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist, squareform
from Levenshtein import jaro_winkler, distance
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, cut_tree, dendrogram
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

def recurrent_transactions(transactions):

    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].fillna("")

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True).str.lower().str.strip()

    distance_matrix = squareform(pdist(transactions['party2'].values.reshape(-1,1), lambda x, y : distance(x[0], y[0])))

    # For testing purpose only
    # dend = dendrogram(linkage(distance_matrix, method  = "ward"))
    # plt.title('Dendrogram')
    # plt.xlabel('Customers')
    # plt.ylabel('Euclidean distances')
    # plt.show()

    transactions['Group_ID'] = cut_tree(linkage(distance_matrix, method='complete'), height=1.5)

    return transactions

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def internal_payment(transactions, accountHolder, bank, accountType):

    holderName_stop = "AND SOLUTION.*|AND EXIM PVT.*|^Messrs  SREE |M/S SREE |M/S.SRI |M/S. SREE |^Messrs SREE |^Mr.|^Mr |^Mrs |^Ms |^MR.|^MR |^MS.|^Messrs|^M/S |^M/s|^M/S.|\\.|\\*|\\bLLP\\b|PRIVATE.*|LIMITED|Private.*|Limited|Pvt.*|^SHR.| SERVICES.*| FINANCIAL.*| INDIA LIMIT.*| INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED.*| INDIA PVT.*| COMPANY.*| SHREE | PVT.*| STORES$| STORE$| AND GEN.*| SRI |^SRI |^SREE | CO.PVT.*| MFG.CO.PVT.*|PVT LTD|PVTLTD|(PVT) LTD|^: M/S"
    accountHolderAsDF = pd.DataFrame([accountHolder])
    accountName = accountHolderAsDF[0].replace(to_replace=holderName_stop, value="", regex=True).replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True).str.lower().str.strip().replace(to_replace="\.", value="", regex=True)
    transactions['internalName'] = transactions.partyName.replace(to_replace=holderName_stop, value="", regex=True).replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True).replace(to_replace="\d", value="", regex=True).str.lower()

    internal_pay_category = ["INTERNAL_FUND_TRANSFER","NEFT","IMPS","RTGS","MOBILE_BANKING","UPI","INTERNET_BANKING","CHEQUE_DEPOSIT","CHEQUE_PAID","BULK_POSTING","TRANSFER","FUND_TRANSFER","TPT"]
    not_internal_pay_cat = ["INWARD_BOUNCE","CHEQUE_RETURN","REVERSAL"]
    not_internal_pay_sub = ["SALARY_DISBURSED","CARD_RECEIPTS"]

    #account type=saving
    if accountType == 'SAVING':
        accountName_Saving = py_extract(accountName, "([a-z]{5,6})", index=0)
        name_dist_saving = transactions.internalName.apply(fuzzy_match, s2=accountName_Saving.iloc[0], dist=75)
        conditions_choices = [
            [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(internal_pay_category) & transactions.transactionSubcategory.ne("SALARY")  & name_dist_saving, "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"]
        ]

        df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
        transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

        conditions_choices = [
            [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(not_internal_pay_cat) & transactions.transactionSubcategory.eq("INTERNAL_PAYMENT") , ""]
        ]

        df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
        transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

    elif accountType == 'CURRENT':
        accountName_current = py_extract(accountName, "([a-z]{4,6})", index=0)
        name_dist_current = transactions.internalName.apply(fuzzy_match, s2=accountName_current.iloc[0], dist=75)

        conditions_choices = [
            [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(internal_pay_category) & ~transactions.transactionSubcategory.isin(not_internal_pay_sub) & name_dist_current, "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"]
        ]

        df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
        transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

        conditions_choices = [
            [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(not_internal_pay_cat) & transactions.transactionSubcategory.eq("INTERNAL_PAYMENT") , ""]
        ]

        df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
        transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.transactionSubcategory.eq("INTERNAL_PAYMENT"), "true"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['isInternalPayment'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default='false')

    return transactions

@app.route('/')
def home():
   return jsonify({'response' : 'Hello! Flask.'})

@app.route('/recurrentTransactions', methods=['POST'])
def recurrentTransactions():
   requestPayload = request.get_json()

   transactions = pd.json_normalize(requestPayload['transactions'])
   accountUID = requestPayload['accountUID']
   if True in [x in (None, '') for x in [accountUID]]:
      return dict({"error" : "Value(s) missing in Request Payload"})

   app.logger.info(f"transactions : {len(transactions.index)}, accountUID : {accountUID}")
   transactions = recurrent_transactions(transactions)
   result = transactions.to_json(orient='records')
   return jsonify({"response" : json.loads(result)})

@app.route('/categorizeTransaction', methods=['POST'])

   requestPayload = request.get_json()
   
   bank = requestPayload['bank']
   accountType = requestPayload['acc_type']
   accountUID = requestPayload['accountUID']
   accountHolder = requestPayload['accountHolder']
   isPFMEnabled = False
   isPFMEnabled = requestPayload.get('isPFMEnabled')

   transactions = pd.json_normalize(requestPayload['transactions'])
   
   if True in [x in (None, '') for x in [bank, accountType, accountUID]]:
      return dict({"error" : "Value(s) missing in Request Payload"})

   transactions = AppUtil.clean_input_df(transactions)

      if accountType == "CREDIT_CARD":
         app.logger.info(f"Assigning Clean Names to {bank} CC Txns for accountUID {accountUID}")
         transactions = card_clean_names(transactions)
         app.logger.info(f"Assigning Purpose to {bank} CC Txns for accountUID {accountUID}")
         transactions = card_purpose(transactions)

      transactions = purpose(transactions, accountType)
      app.logger.info(f"Assigning Clean Names to {bank} Txns for accountUID {accountUID}")
      transactions = clean_names(transactions, accountType, bank)
      if accountHolder and accountHolder.strip() != "":
         app.logger.info(f"Detecting Internal Payments in {bank} Txns for accountUID {accountUID}")
         transactions = internal_payment(transactions, accountHolder, bank, accountType)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist, squareform
from Levenshtein import jaro_winkler, distance
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, cut_tree, dendrogram
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import traceback


def getmode(txn):
    unique_amount_df = txn.amount.unique()
    txn.reset_index().set_index('amount').loc[unique_amount_df, 'index'].values
    return 


def salary_detection(transactions):
    try:
        #assign empty string to cells with null values
        transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].fillna("")

        #grouping of data by similar party names
        STOP_WORDS_PARTYNAME = "privatelimited|private|limited|pvtltd"
        transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True).str.lower().replace(to_replace=STOP_WORDS_PARTYNAME, value="", regex=True).str.strip()
        # grouping using clustering
        distance_matrix = squareform(pdist(transactions['party2'].values.reshape(-1,1), lambda x, y : distance(x[0], y[0])))
        
        # For testing purpose only
        # dend = dendrogram(linkage(distance_matrix, method  = "complete"))
        # plt.title('Dendrogram')
        # plt.xlabel('Customers')
        # plt.ylabel('Euclidean distances')
        # plt.show()
        
        transactions['Group_ID'] = cut_tree(linkage(distance_matrix, method='complete'), height=1.5)

        #finding the probable salary txns set
        NOT_SALARY = "XX4700.*Mobi|Mobi.*XX4700|credit card/|Deposit / Investment|MOB/TPFT/"
        LOAN_POSITIVE = "\\binsta\\s?loan|SHUBHLOANS|DISBUR-|\\besloan|\\bloan\\b|disbur\\s?s|disbur|disbu\\b|cashbean fund tr|NODAL A/C|NODAL Ac|NODALAC|KisshtFund|NODAL A C|ICICI BANK NODA"
        EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT = "CASH_DEPOSIT|FIXED_DEPOSIT|SELF_DEPOSIT|CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES|DEPOSITORY_CHARGES|FLEXI_DEPOSIT|INTEREST_ON_DEPOSIT|RECURRING_DEPOSIT"   # All the deposits except cheque deposit will be excluded from salary txn
       
        # filtering out txns to create sub txn dataframe for salary detection
        transactions_sub = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['partyName'].str.len().gt(0) & transactions_sub['partyName'].notnull()]

        # remove txns with salary amount more than 30000 and divisible by 10000
        transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~(transactions_sub['amount'].gt(30000) & transactions['amount'].mod(10000).eq(0))]
        
        #transforming date into YYYY-MM form
        transactions['dateSal'] = pd.to_datetime(transactions['transactionDate'], format="%d/%m/%Y").dt.to_period('M')
        # calculate month_freq
        month_freq = len(transactions.groupby('dateSal'))

        #Find whether salary detected or not
        salaryDetect = "SALARY" in transactions.transactionSubcategory.values

        # Scenario 1 - when salary detect is FALSE
        if salaryDetect == False and len(transactions_sub) > 0:
            #CASE 1.1 - Assigning salary based on same amount repeating more than 1
            mode_amount = transactions_sub.amount.mode().max()
            mode_freq = transactions_sub.amount.value_counts().max()
            if mode_freq > 1:
                mode_group_id = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['amount'].eq(mode_amount)].iloc[0].Group_ID
                conditions_choices = [
                    [transactions.amount.eq(mode_amount) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.Group_ID.eq(mode_group_id), "SALARY"]
                ]
                df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
                transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
            else:
                #CASE 1.2 - Assigning salary based on highest amount with frequent Party Name respectively
                transactions_sub_desc = transactions_sub.sort_values('amount', ascending=False)
                for i, transaction_sub_desc in transactions_sub_desc.iterrows():
                    salary_partyName = transaction_sub_desc.partyName
                    salary_groupid = transaction_sub_desc.Group_ID
                    name_freq = len(transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")])
                    if name_freq >= 0.5 * month_freq:
                        break
                if name_freq >= 0.5 * month_freq and name_freq < 2.5 * month_freq:
                    conditions_choices = [
                        [transactions.Group_ID.eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "SALARY"]
                    ]
                    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
                    transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)
            #Scenario 1.3 - Again detecting the salary from the transaction not having partyName, so that frequent salary are same 
            # and the 1st level category is same and month_freq == mode_freq_sub1
            salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])
            if month_freq > 1 and salary_freq < month_freq : 
                transactions_subType = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
                transactions_subType = transactions_subType[~transactions_subType['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
                mode_amount_subType = transactions_subType.amount.mode().max()
                mode_freq_subType = transactions_subType.amount.value_counts().max()
                category = transactions_subType.transactionCategory.mode().max()
                if mode_freq_subType == month_freq and mode_freq_subType > 1 :
                    conditions_choices = [
                        [transactions.amount.eq(mode_amount_subType) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.transactionCategory.eq(category), "SALARY"]
                    ]
                    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
                    transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)


        #Scenario 2 - when salary detect is TRUE 
        #checking whether salary was detected in Scenario 1 or salary detected initially from older scripts
        salaryDetect = "SALARY" in transactions.transactionSubcategory.values
        if salaryDetect == True:
            salary_partyName = transactions[transactions['partyName'].ne("") & transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")].filter(items=['partyName', 'transactionDate', 'amount', 'Group_ID']).sort_values('partyName', ascending=False)
            if len(salary_partyName) > 0:
                for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
                    for j, sal_partyName in salary_partyName.iterrows():
                        if transaction.Group_ID == sal_partyName.Group_ID and transaction.type == "CREDIT" and transaction.transactionCategory not in ["UPI", "IMPS"]:
                            transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"

            #assigning reimbursement for those salary txns where party name is not present
            salary_no_partyname = transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY") & transactions['partyName'].eq("")] 
            if len(salary_no_partyname) > 0:
                salary_max = salary_no_partyname.amount.max()
                conditions_choices = [
                    [transactions.transactionSubcategory.eq("SALARY") & transactions.partyName.eq("") & transactions.amount.lt(0.3*salary_max), "REIMBURSEMENT"]
                ]
                df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
                transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

            # assigning reimbursement based on max salary amount & group_id where party name is present
            for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
                if transaction.transactionSubcategory == "SALARY" and transaction.partyName != "":
                    salary_max_groupid = transaction.Group_ID
                    salary_max = transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_max_groupid)].amount.max()
                    if transaction.amount < 0.3 * salary_max and transaction.amount < 20000:
                        transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "REIMBURSEMENT"

            #SECOND SALARY
            #Looking for second salary only when previous salary is less than 80% of month_freq
            salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])
            if salary_freq < 0.8*month_freq:
                #finding the probable salary txns set again for second salary
                transactions_sub = transactions[transactions['type'].eq("CREDIT") & transactions['description'].notnull() & transactions['amount'].gt(2999)]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].isin(["INTERNAL_PAYMENT", "INVESTMENT_INCOME", "TRANSFER_FROM_WALLET", "INSURANCE_CLAIM", "EMI_MORATORIUM", "RENT", "REIMBURSEMENT", "SUBSIDIES", "RENT_INCOME"])]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['merchantType'].isin(["Pension"])]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].isin(["CASHBACK", "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE", "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE", "UPI", "IMPS","AUTO_SWEEP"])]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains("REVERSAL|RETURN|INTEREST|REFUND|CANCEL", na=False)]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['transactionCategory'].str.contains(EXCLUDE_DEPOSIT, na = False, case=False)]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(LOAN_POSITIVE, na=False, case=False)]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~transactions_sub['description'].str.contains(NOT_SALARY, na=False, case=False)]
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['partyName'].str.len().gt(0) & transactions_sub['partyName'].notnull()]

                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[~(transactions_sub['amount'].gt(30000) & transactions['amount'].mod(10000).eq(0))]

                #CASE 2.1 Checking for second salary based on freq
                transactions_sub_desc_not_sal = transactions_sub[transactions_sub.transactionSubcategory.ne("SALARY")].sort_values('partyName', ascending=False)
                if len(transactions_sub_desc_not_sal)>0:
                    txn_sub_desc_not_sal_length = len(transactions_sub_desc_not_sal)
                    for i in range(txn_sub_desc_not_sal_length):
                        salary_partyName = transactions_sub_desc_not_sal.iloc[i].partyName
                        salary_groupid = transactions_sub_desc_not_sal.iloc[i].Group_ID
                        name_freq = len(transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")])
                        if name_freq > 1:
                            break
                    if name_freq > 1 and name_freq < 2.5 * month_freq:
                        conditions_choices = [
                            [transactions.Group_ID.eq(salary_groupid) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "SALARY"]
                        ]
                        df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
                        transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

                #CASE 2.2 checking for second salary only based on average amount & if salary freq is less than 80% of month_freq
                salary_freq = len(transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")])

                if salary_freq < 0.8 * month_freq:
                    salary_average = transactions[transactions['transactionSubcategory'].eq("SALARY")].amount.mean()
                    if len(transactions_sub) > 0:
                        for i, transaction in transactions_sub.iterrows():
                            if (transaction.amount >= 0.65 * salary_average and transaction.amount <= 1.6 * salary_average) and transaction.type == "CREDIT":
                                transactions_sub.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"

                #filtering for only salary transactions
                transactions_sub = transactions_sub[transactions_sub['transactionSubcategory'].eq('SALARY')]
                #assigning second salary & reimbursement based on Group_id
                if len(transactions_sub) > 0:
                    for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
                        for j, transaction_sub in transactions_sub.iterrows():
                            if transaction.Group_ID == transaction_sub.Group_ID:
                                if transaction.transactionCategory not in ["UPI", "IMPS"] and transaction.type == "CREDIT":
                                    transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "SALARY"

                #assigning reimbursement
                for i, transaction in transactions.iterrows():
                    if transaction.transactionSubcategory == "SALARY" and transaction.partyName != "":
                        salary_max_groupid = transaction.Group_ID
                        salary_max = transactions[transactions['Group_ID'].eq(salary_max_groupid)].amount.max()
                        if transaction.amount <  0.3 * salary_max and transaction.amount < 20000:
                            transactions.at[i, 'transactionSubcategory'] = "REIMBURSEMENT"
            
            conditions_choices = [
                [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"), ""],
                [transactions.amount.eq(1), ""]
            ]

            df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
            transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.transactionSubcategory)

            transactions.drop('dateSal', inplace=True, axis=1)
        return transactions

    except Exception as e:
        print(traceback.format_exc())
        return None

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_SBI_transactions(transactions, accountType):

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(ACC_VERIF, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.eq(1) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ITD TAX REFUND|\\bGST REFUND", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "TAX_REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASHBACK|[Cc]ashback|upi-cashba|goog.*payme/Rewa|Rewarded fo|goog-payme/UPI|Rewardz", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REVERSE ATM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^REVERSE POS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("UPI/REV/|UPI.*REVERSAL|\\bUPI.*/Refun-", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INB Reversal", na=False, case=False) , "INB_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bNEFTRR", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS.*DOES NOT EXIST", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^I/W CHQ RTN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RETURN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("reversal|\\brev\\b|CHRG RVL", na=False, case=False), "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^Bulk posting", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.amount.lt(15.76) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("bharat p|CR_PETROL|CASHLESS IN|DISCOUNT ON FUEL|Refund of|refund|IPAY_RFND|REFUNDABLE", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INT surcharge", na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DOM surcharge", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CHQ RET CHAR|cheque returned charg|\\bret charge?", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Mm]andate fail [Cc]hrg|[Cc]ha?rg.*fail|ACH RETURN CHG|ECSRTNCHG|NACH FAIL INSUF BAL|\\bSI FAILURE CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POS DECLINE CH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATM DECLINE CH|\\bATM.*insuff|INSUF BAL ATM DECLINE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("OD PNL INTT", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH MANDATE CHARGE|E mandate|\\bACH\\b CHARGE?", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(150) , "AUTO_MANDATE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CDM SERVICE CHARGE|\\bCDM CHARGE|CASH DEPOSIT CHAR?", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(150) , "CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ATM.*CHARGE?|FEE-ATM CASH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATM CASH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.isin([9.44,23.6]) , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SMS CHARG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INSTANT_ALERT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Monthly.*\\bBal\\b No\\b|MAB SB Debit|MIN BAL CHGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FI SERVICE CHARG?E?", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FI_SERVICE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ STOP", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "STOP_CHEQUE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("COMM.*BG ISS|cgmfu fee", na=False, case=False) , "BANK_GUARANTEE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATMCard AMC|AMC Debit Card", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATM WDL|\\bATM CASH|Cash withdrawal|CASH Withdrawn|ATM CASH|CSH WDL|ATM.*SWPO", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.gt(99) , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHEQUE.*CASH WITHDRAWAL BY|^CASH CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCLG\\b|^BY CLEARING|^TO CLEARING|\\bCHQ\\b|CHEQUE|CHEQ NO", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCLG\\b|^BY CLEARING|^TO CLEARING|\\bCHQ\\b|CHEQUE|CHEQ NO", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCH [0-9]{6}-", na=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bACHCr|NACH00", na=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_CREDIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCMP\\b MANDATE|\\bACHDr\\b|tr for ddr|APY_|ECS COLLECTION|\\bSI Setting|Autopay|DIRECT DR|^DEBIT-\\s?[0-9]|\\bNACH00", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRANSFER-?\\s?UPI|\\bUPI/[DC]R|UPI-?/?", na=False, case=False) , "UPI"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^by debit card|POS ATM|OTHPOS\\b|\\bSBIPG|OTHPG\\b|OTHPOS|SBIPOS|\\bSWOS|POS PRCH-POS|^POS ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FD OPEN|e-STDR|e-TDR|for TDR-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FIXED_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\be-RD|RDInstall|\\be- FLEXI", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "RECURRING_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS|I M P S", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bINB\\b| I N B$", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNET_BANKING"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FI Txn", na=False, case=False) , "FINANCIAL_INCLUSION_TRANSACTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INTEREST|Normal Int\\.Coll", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SWEEP\\b", na=False, case=False) , "AUTO_SWEEP"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("dd issue", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DEMAND_DRAFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CSH \\bDEP\\b|\\bCDM|CASH Deposit", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"CASH_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FEE EXCESS|\\bchr?gs?\\b|ATMCard AMC|^TO TRANSFER-COMM|charges|^Forex Txn", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BULK POSTING", na=False, case=False) , "BULK_POSTING"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^- 000000", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REFUND"]
    ]

    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)

    return transactions

1	import pandas as pd
2	import numpy as np
3	import re
4	from fuzzywuzzy import fuzz
5	
6	def clean_input_df(transactions):
7	    
8	    transactions['description'] = transactions['description'].str.strip() #pd.Series(transactions['description'], dtype='string')
9	    transactions['amount'] = pd.to_numeric(transactions['amount'])
10	    transactions['balanceAfterTransaction'] = pd.to_numeric(transactions['balanceAfterTransaction'])
11	
12	    return transactions
13	
14	def sep_by_(description, n1, n2):
15	    return description.str.split('/').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
16	
17	def sep_by_dash(description, n1, n2):
18	    return description.str.split('-').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
19	
20	def sep_by_wave(description, n1, n2):
21	    return description.str.split('~').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
22	
23	def sep_by_star(description, n1, n2):
24	    return description.str.split('*').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
25	
26	def sep_by_comma(description, n1, n2):
27	    return description.str.split(',').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
28	
29	def sep_by_colon(description, n1, n2):
30	    return description.str.split(':').str[n1:n2].str.join('')
31	
32	def sep_by_under(description, n1, n2):

steps.message: Found bug 4. HDFC.py line 98 compares `description.shift(periods=2)` for REVERSAL while every other bank (ICICI, Saraswat, SCB) uses `shift(periods=1)`. This is the structural offset causing a reversal-after-matching-debit to fall through to AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE. The other bugs are likely in HDFC.py too. Let me read the whole file.

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_HDFC_transactions(transactions, accountType):

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER, na=False, case=False) &  transactions.amount.lt(2) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH.*-AY20[012]|Income Tax", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "TAX_REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CBDT TAX|CBDT|FD REDEEM TAX", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"DIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST/|KARNATAKACTD\\b", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"INDIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^DC EMI LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|REWARDs|GOOG-PAYMENT|phonepeincentive", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("UPI.*REFUND|IMPS.*REFUND|^REF-|^RREF|PAYAIR|-REFUND-|WAIVER|IOC REF NO|EXGRATIA REFUND", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REFUND"], #add merchant refund condition for merchant partyName via NER
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CRV POS|^POS REF", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.lt(25) , "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^POS.*RVSL|^CRV POS|^POS REF|UNCLAIM POSTXN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REV-UPI|UPI RET-", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REV-IMPS", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NWD-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.lt(0) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Rr][Ee][Vv][Ee][Rr][Ss][Aa][Ll]|\\bREV\\b|\\bRVS[DL]|REVERSED|REV_SI|CHGS? REVERS|\\bDD CANCELLED|^REV_FEE", na=False, case=False) , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.ACH|EMI RTN CHARG|\\bSI\\b FAIL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SI\\b |AUTOPAY \\bSI\\b|^EMI.*CHQ|^DC EMI LOAN|^ACH D-|^RP-|^APY\\d|^ECS D|FINEMI|H - HDB|_EMI|INVESTNOW|BFHL|BHFL|BFEM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS-RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ RETURN CHG|CHQ DEP RET CHG|Chq RTN C\\s?ha?rg|GST.*Chq rtn|CHEQUE.*RETURN CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.POS DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\..*DECCHG ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CARD.*ISSUANCE FEE|DEBIT CARD.*FEE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^\\.IMPS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "IMPS_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH.*CHGS?|CASH TXN INC GST|CASH CHARGES|CASH DEPOSIT CHARGES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FEE-ATM CASH|^\\.ATM FEES", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INST-ALERT CHG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INSTANT_ALERT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("STOP CHEQUE CHGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "STOP_CHEQUE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SETTLEMENT CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "SETTLEMENT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DEPOSITORY CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DEPOSITORY_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bAMB\\b CHRG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DC INTL POS|DEBIT CARD PUR ADJ", na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RFX.*GST|RFX.*COMM|FCY MARKUP FEE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FOREX_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FUEL SURCHG", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/MCA\\b", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "MCA_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BG ISSUANCE CHARGE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "BANK_GUARANTEE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("loan.*charg", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_CHARGES_HDFC, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NWD-|^EAW-|^ATW-|MICRO ATM CASH|ATM-CASH|MCTF ATW|[0-9]NWD-|[0-9]EAW-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH D-|^SI\\b|AUTOPAY \\bSI\\b|^EMI.*C[Hh][Qq]|^APY\\d|^RP-|^ECS D|FINEMI-BF|_EMI|H - HDB|INVESTNOW|BFHL|BHFL| SI -|BFEM|^REL MF|^ME DC SI|BILLPAY DR-HDFCSI-|ACH D- TP ACH", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.description.str.contains("fail", na=False, case=False) == False) &   transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/PAYTMBILLPAYMENT", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYTM_BILL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bbbps\\b", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"BBPS_BILL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Payzapp Bill", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYZAPP_BILL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH C|^ACH DR O/W ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_CREDIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^POS |MCTF|[0-9]POS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("-TPT-", na=False, case=False)  , "TPT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI|UPI-?\\s?", na=False, case=False) , "UPI"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS-", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT [CcDd][Rr]-|[0-9]NEFT TO|^BULK NEFT", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^APBS", na=False, case=False) , "AADHAAR_PAY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bIB\\b FUNDS", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNET_BANKING"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CREDIT INTEREST|INT\\. ON SWCR|O/S INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^FD THROUGH|^FD BOOKED", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FIXED_DEPOSIT"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RD INSTALLMENT|RD [Ii]nstallment|^RD\\b|RD OPENING", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "RECURRING_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SWEEP\\b", na=False, case=False) , "AUTO_SWEEP"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^I/W CHQ RET|CHQ DEP RET|MC CANCELLED|CHQ RTN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ DEP RET|CHQ RTN|^CHQ RET [A-Z]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\b[Cc][Hh][Qq]\\b|^I/W CHQ RETURN|[Cc]heque|CHEQUE", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REVERSAL.*CLG|MC CANCELLED", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\b[Cc][Hh][Qq]\\b|^I/W CHQ RETURN|[Cc]heque|CHEQUE", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Chq Paid|CHQ COLL|CHEQ PAID", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")  , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CHQ DEP|CHQ COLL", na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bdd issue|DD Issue", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "DEMAND_DRAFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH \\bDEP", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"CASH_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/CCA", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_CCAVENUE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/RAZP|^RAZORPAY", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_RAZORPAY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/PAYU", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_PAYU"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/CITRUS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_CITRUS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/CSHFRE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_CASHFREE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/PAYTM|-PAYTM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_PAYTM"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/ATOM", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_ATOM"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/BILLDK", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_BILLDESK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/ZAAK", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_ZAAKPAY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/EBS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") ,"PAYMENT_VIA_EBS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bIB\\b BILLPAY|ATM BILLPAY|HD.*BILLPAY|ONLINEPAYMENT|HGA1P", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "HDFC_BILL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("PREMATURE RD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"RD_PREMATURE_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RD\\b|MATURED? RD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"RD_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FD PREMAT PRIN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"FD_PREMATURE_PRINCIPAL_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("FD PREMAT INT", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"FD_PREMATURE_INTEREST_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("PRIN AND INT AUTO_REDEEM|FD REDEEM PRINCIPA", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"FD_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INT. AUTO_REDEMPTION|FD REDEEM INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") ,"FD_INTEREST_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bCHR?GS?|^SERVICE CHARGE|\\bCHARGES?\\b|FEE-|[SC]GST|CHQBK_COURIER", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.lt(5000), "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[Ff][tT]\\b|FUND TRF", na=False, case=False)  , "FUND_TRANSFER"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CLOSE OUT W/D", na=False, case=False)  , "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE"],
        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=2)) & transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS|NEFT|\\bUPI|RTGS", na=False, case=False), "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=1)), "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [(transactions.remark.str.len().eq(15)) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0]{11}[0-9]{5}", na=False, case=False) , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionCategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="TRANSFER")

    transactions['transactionSubcategory']=""
    transactions['merchantType']=""
    transactions['partyName']=""

    HDFC_FD = ["RD_PREMATURE_REDEMPTION","RD_REDEMPTION","FD_PREMATURE_INTEREST_REDEMPTION","FD_REDEMPTION","FD_INTEREST_REDEMPTION"]

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(HDFC_FD) , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(" RE-|INT\\. ON SWCR", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")  & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NET PO FROM HSL A/C", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")  , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^DC EMI LOAN|OVERDUE LOAN.*RECOVER|^EMI\\b.*[Cc][Hh][Qq]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_REPAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("INSTA LOAN|JUMBO LOAN|^PL-", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "LOAN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INVESTNOW|-STP-|NET PI TO HSL SEC A/C", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INVESTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^A2AINT01", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "SALARY"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["RECURRING_DEPOSIT","FIXED_DEPOSIT"]) , "INVESTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("HDFCC|BILLPAY DR-HDFCSI-", na=False, case=False) , "CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bRFX.*@|FCY OUTWARD REMITTANCE|HDFC BANK FOREX", na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_TXN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GST/", na=False, case=False) ,"GST"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") & transactions.description.str.contains("^[0-9]{6}$", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVINGS") , "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("-\\s?SAL ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & (accountType=="CURRENT"), "SALARY_DISBURSED"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.shift(periods=1).eq("CHEQUE_PAID") & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHEQUE_RETURN") & transactions.balanceAfterTransaction.shift(periods=1).lt(0) & (accountType != "OVER_DRAFT") ,"INSUFFICIENTS_FUNDS_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bSELF\\b|\\bSelf\\b", na=False, case=False), "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BULK NEFT", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.gt(1000), "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^EMI [X]+[0-9]+ [Cc][Hh][Qq]", na=False, case=False) , "Bank Loan"]
    ]
    
    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['merchantType'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    SAL_STOP_WORDS =  [" 2021 "," 2019 "," 2020 ","salaryforthemonthof","sal","salary","for","jan","feb","mar","apr","may","june","july","aug","sep","oct","nov","dec","the","month","of","january","february","march","april","may","june","july","august","september","salaryaug","salarydec","salaryfeb","salaryjan","salarynov","salaryoct","salarysep","jun","jul","tpt","from","to","salary payout"]
    SAL_STOP_WORDS1 = "^jan$|^feb$|^mar$|^apr$|^may$|^jun$|^jul$|^aug$|^sep$|^oct$|^nov$|^dec$"
    POS_STOP_WORDS = ["-?_?WWW\\.?","PAYU-?_?\\*?","PAYU_WWW.","\\.?\\s?PO\\s?S D\\s?E\\s?B\\s?I\\s?T\\s?","\\.COM","\\bCOM\\b","PF\\*[A-Z]{3}\\*","^[A-Z]+\\s?\\*","\\.IN","\\bIN\\b","\\.C","\\b[A-Z]$"]
    NAMES_STOP_WORDS = [".rzp"]

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^A2AINT01", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RAZORPAY|^PL-", na=False, case=False) , ""],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-BILLDESK", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,4).replace(to_replace="BILLDESK.|BILLDESKPAY.|@.+", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-XXXI", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-XX", na=False, case=False) , ""],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("-RAZOR.PAY|RAZORPAYPG@|RAZORPAY-RAZORPAY@|-RAZORPAY.PG|-RAZORPAY.PAYOUT|-RAZORPAYX\\.", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,5,6).replace(to_replace="[0-9]{8,10}", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("UPI.*-RZ?PY\\.", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="-RZ?PY\\.(.*)@", index=0).replace(to_replace="\d+", value="", regex=True)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-|^ACH C-", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TAX_REFUND") == False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS-.*RAZORPAY - MERCHANT", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,6,7)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS-.*RAZORPAY SOFTWARE", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,5,6)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [CD][Rr]-[A-z0-9]{11}-[0-9]{7,}-", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,3,4)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT [CD][Rr]-[A-z0-9]{11}-[A-Z]-", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,4)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS-|^NEFT [CD][Rr]", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace="\\,?\\.$|/$|\\*$|\\,{1,2}$|^\\.{2}|\\s?-$|.rzp", value="", regex=True).str.strip().str.title()

    conditions_choices = [

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("Micr Clg|Chq Paid", na=False, case=False)  , ""],
        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("[A-Za-z]", na=False, case=False)==False , ""]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*NET", na=False, case=False) , "Netflix"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*AMAZON", na=False, case=False) , "Amazon Prime"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)

    return transactions

229	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI-PAYTM-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
230	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("[0-9]ipay$", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
231	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("pasfar",na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,5,6).replace(to_replace="\d+", value="", regex=True)],
232	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("^razorpay$",na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,6,7).replace(to_replace="\d+", value="", regex=True)],
233	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Na$|On Tapping|Collect From Raz|Payment From Pho|Payviarazorpay|^Upi$|^Payment$", na=False, case=False) , ""],
234	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^SALARY", na=False, case=False) ,  transactions.partyName.str.lower().replace(to_replace="|".join(SAL_STOP_WORDS), value="", regex=True)],
235	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains(SAL_STOP_WORDS1, na=False, case=False), transactions.partyName.str.lower().replace(to_replace=SAL_STOP_WORDS1, value="", regex=True)]
236	    ]
237	
238	    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
239	    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)
240	
241	    conditions_choices = [
242	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("UPI") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("\\bADD|-GOOG-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,4)]
243	    ]
244	
245	    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
246	    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)
247	    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].str.title()
248	
249	    #clean names for hdfc
250	    conditions_choices = [
251	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IMPS.*-UNREGISTERED-", na=False, case=False)  , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,4,5)],
252	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains(HDFC_CLEAN1, na=False, case=False), ""],
253	        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("TRANSFER") & transactions.partyName.str.contains("^By", na=False, case=False), transactions.partyName.replace(to_replace="^By ", value="", regex=True)],
254	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CC [0-9].*AUTOPAY SI-[TM]AD", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="^CC (.*) AUTOPAY SI-[TM]AD", index=0)],
255	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("Cash Paid To .*", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat="Cash Paid To (.*)", index=0)],
256	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Trn?f To |^Fnf To |^Paid To |^Fund Trf To|^Amt Paid To", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat=" To (.*)", index=0)],
257	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("^Trf ", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.partyName, pat="Trf (.*)", index=0)],
258	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^IB BILLPAY DR-HDFCSI-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
259	        [transactions.description.str.contains("ccbillpay", na=False, case=False) , ""],
260	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("Micr Clg|Chq Paid", na=False, case=False)  , ""],
261	        [transactions.partyName.str.contains("[A-Za-z]", na=False, case=False)==False , ""]
262	    ]
263	
264	    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
265	    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)
266	
267	    conditions_choices = [
268	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*NET", na=False, case=False) , "Netflix"],
269	        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ME DC SI.*AMAZON", na=False, case=False) , "Amazon Prime"]
270	    ]
271	
272	    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
273	    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default=transactions.partyName)
274	
275	    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)
276	
277	    return transactions

steps.message:
All four bugs are converging on HDFC.py. I've confirmed three:
- **Bug 4** (line 98): `description.shift(periods=2)` for REVERSAL vs. `shift(periods=1)` in every other bank.
- **Bug 1b** (line 124): `accountType=="SAVINGS"` — everywhere else the value is `"SAVING"`.
- **Bug 1a** (line 100): a length/pattern boundary mismatch to confirm.

Let me examine the regex constants used by HDFC for the cheque, transfer (direction word), and bill (slash) extraction.

steps.message: Three bugs are confirmed in HDFC.py. The remaining two (direction-word name, slash 4-field bill payee) may be in HDFC or another bank. Let me check ICICI (classic `BIL/type/ref/payee` slash format) and look at the slash/direction extraction across banks.
