import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import re
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.AppUtil import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.RegexConstants import *
from categorizationapp.UtilityScripts.BankRegexConstants import *

def categorize_ICICI_transactions(transactions, accountType):
    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^OPENING BALANCE", na=False, case=False) , "OPENING_BALANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER_ICICI, na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.isin([1,-1]) & ~transactions.description.str.contains("\\bRVSL\\b", na=False, case=False), "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH\\s?BACK|[Cc]ashback|Rewarded for pa|Deal of Day|goog-\\s?payment@ok|Bhim\\s?Rew", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASHBACK"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("iWish", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FLEXI_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Trf to fd", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FIXED_DEPOSIT"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("To RD ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "RECURRING_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int on FD/RD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST_ON_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Sweep to|Rev Sweep From", na=False, case=False) , "AUTO_SWEEP"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REV_NACH|ES-Refund",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH.*AY20[012]",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "TAX_REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DTAX\\b|BCTT|Profesionaltax|GIB.*D TAX",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "DIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("IDTX\\b|/S\\s?TAX\\s?/|^GIB.*G\\s?ST",  na=False, case=False)  & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "INDIRECT_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("PAYMNT RVSL/|IIN/RVSL|NT RVSL/|_VIN\\b|_VPS\\b",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[IV]PS",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.gt(51) , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI/RVSL|^REV UPI", na=False, case=False) , "UPI_REVERSAL"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ATM.*RVSL|WDL RVSL|SNC/RVSL", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ChgsRev|CHRGS REV", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHARGES_REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("REVERSAL|Rvsl|RVSL|BIL/\\s?REV|Bil/Rev|\\bREV\\b|^FC REV|DD Cance?l|TDS REF CWDL", na=False, case=False) , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BOUNCEC\\s?HG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("MMT/IMPS/.+SBIN00CARD|MMT/IMPS/.+/Credit Card/|MMT/IMPS/.+RATN0CRCARD", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT")  , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CardRfnd|^REFUND|RFND|/.*REFUND.*/|/.*[Rr]efund(.*)?/|VISA-REFUND|IPS REF|^VISA REF|^VPS|^MCD REF|^REF |^[Rr]ef |ISA REF|^MCD|Refunde?d?|^MCI REF|MMT/REFUND",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^surcharge|P:Surcharge", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Mandate.*chgs|NACH_CHRG", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_MANDATE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Mob alrt Chg", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INSTANT_ALERT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Drcard.*fee|Drcard.*chrg|Drcard.*charge?|DCardfee|Dbt card Chg|CARD ANNUAL FEE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH ANW-CHRGS|CashTxnChgs|CASHTXN.*CHGS|Cash dep Chg", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("MABchgs|NMMAB Chg",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "NMMAB_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^PTLSCG|^TIPS",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "FUEL_SURCHARGE"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("SMSChgs|ATM OR SMS CHARGES",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INSTANT_ALERT_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATMDEC CHG",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_DECLINE_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^V?[0-9]?:?[Dd][tT]:|^V[0-9]{2}:[Dd][tT]:",  na=False, case=False) ,"FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("POSDEC CHG",  na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "POS_PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ATD-|ECSRTNCHG|RTN_?\\s?CHRG|ECS DR RTN|ATD.*RTNCHGS|ECSRTCHG|^SI reject|ACH Dr Rtn Chg|BOUNCEC\\s?HGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ECS_PENALTY"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTN CHG|BOUNCECHGS|Chq rtn Chg|RTNCHGS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN_PENALTY"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTNCHGS?|TXNDEC CHG|Penal Chg", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "PENALTY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^REJECT:|^RET:", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^REJECT:", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS-RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS_RETURN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NEFT-RETURN", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT_RETURN"], 
        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.str.contains("IMPS|NEFT|\\bUPI|RTGS", na=False, case=False), "REVERSAL"],
        [transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.type.shift(periods=1).eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.eq(transactions.amount.shift(periods=1)) & transactions.description.eq(transactions.description.shift(periods=1)) , "AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("DD/CC ISSUED", na=False, case=False) , "DEMAND_DRAFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH/|ECSIDR|^ATD/|/SIPG/|AMAZON STAN|^Self AD|^IPRUGTP-NCA", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "AUTO_CREDIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/|BPAY/|BBPS|Bill Payment", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "BILL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bONL/|^ECOM PUR", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "ONLINE_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH WDL|^cashnet/|Cash Wdl|^NFS/| WDL/|^ATM/|ATM/SACWL|ATM/SFC|^[VM]AT.*CASH", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("ICICI ATM", na=False, case=False) , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ATM-TRFR", na=False, case=False) , "ATM_MONEY_TRANSFER"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("RTGS Chg|NEFT Chg", na=False, case=False) , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^APB", na=False, case=False) , "AADHAAR_PAY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^UPI|^MB-UPI", na=False, case=False) , "UPI"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^MMT/IMPS", na=False, case=False) , "IMPS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^MMT/|^MB\\b", na=False, case=False) , "MOBILE_BANKING"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT|BIL/NEFT/|^INF/NEFT/", na=False, case=False) , "NEFT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS", na=False, case=False) , "RTGS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CMS/", na=False, case=False) , "CMS"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/INFT", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNAL_FUND_TRANSFER"], 
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/|^MIN|^RIN/|^IIN|^VIN", na=False, case=False) , "INTERNET_BANKING"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bC[Ll][Gg]\\b|INWARD CLEARING", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bC[Ll][Gg]\\b", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
        [transactions.remark.str.contains("CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^POS|^VPS|^IPS|^VSI|^MSI/|^RPI/|^MPS", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BRN-TO CASH|CASH PAID:", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Co\\s?ll|Int\\.Pd", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_PAID"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Pd|Int\\.Coll|CREDIT INTEREST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH DEPOSIT|/CASH DEP/|BY CASH|By Cash|CAS H DEP|SELF DEPOSIT|^CAM/|/Cash Dep/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "CASH_DEPOSIT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("[Rr]efund|^REF-[A-Z]", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT"), "REFUND"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ACCT CLOSURE|[Cc]losure", na=False, case=False)  , "BANK_ACCOUNT_CLOSURE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bINF/.*[Ss]elf", na=False, case=False) , "INTRA_ACCOUNT_TRANSFER"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Loan Processing Fee", na=False, case=False) , "LOAN_FEES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_CHARGES_ICICI, na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & transactions.amount.le(2000) , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.amount.eq(23.6)& transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL_CHARGES"],
        [transactions.amount.eq(10.03) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHARGES"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains(" FD clos ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "FD_REDEMPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[A-Z]{5}XX[0-9]+ ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.gt(150) , "AUTO_PAYMENT"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionCategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="TRANSFER")

    transactions['transactionSubcategory']=""
    transactions['merchantType']=""
    transactions['partyName']=""

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPAVC\\b|Auto Debit CC|CREDIT\\s?CA|bil.*/CC/|Ccbill|ccpay|^CCXX|ATD/Auto Debit CC0", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bTOP\\b", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "MOBILE_BILL"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bRCHG\\b", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "RECHARGE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPAC\\b", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "INSURANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bLNPY\\b|EMI on Debit|bankemi/|ICICIEMIN|/emi/|/emi ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "LOAN_REPAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ES-LOAN|\\bInsta PL-|ICICI BANK LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "LOAN"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPUR.*PRIME", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "SUBSCRIPTION"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("GIB.*E\\s?SIC", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INSURANCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ICSP/", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CASHBACK") == False) & (accountType=="SAVING"), "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bEBA\\b|BIL.*/SIPG/|^BIL.*/Investme", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHARGES") == False) , "INVESTMENT"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["FLEXI_DEPOSIT","FIXED_DEPOSIT","RECURRING_DEPOSIT"]) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT")  , "INVESTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("GIB.*/E\\s?PFO|^Dr Tran For Funding", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INVESTMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^EBA/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("REFUND") == False) , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["INTEREST_ON_DEPOSIT", "FD_REDEMPTION"])   , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Self AD PayLater|ICICI BANK LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "LOAN_REPAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ECOM PUR", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "E_COMMERCE"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/INFT|^INF/0", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.contains("salary|salar", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.description.str.contains("ry\\s?now", na=False, case=False)==False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVING") , "SALARY"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("div\\b|FIN\\s?DIV|INT\\s?DIV", na=False, case=False) & transactions.transactionCategory.eq("AUTO_CREDIT") , "INVESTMENT_INCOME"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^GIB.*G\\s?ST", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "GST"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Profesionaltax", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "PROFESSIONAL_TAX"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("/S\\s?TAX\\s?/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "SERVICE_TAX"],
        # negate regex
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF.*/\\s?[Ss]al|^INF.*/\\s?Part [Ss]al|INF/NEFT/.*salary", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.contains("\\b[Ss]ale ", na=False, case=False) & (accountType=="CURRENT") & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT"), "SALARY_DISBURSED"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bSELF|\\bSelf", na=False, case=False) & ~transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_RETURN","REVERSAL"]) , "INTERNAL_PAYMENT"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[A-Z]{5}XX[0-9]+ ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.amount.gt(150), "LOAN_REPAYMENT"],
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['transactionSubcategory'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("Self AD PayLater|Pay Later expen", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "Pay Later"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("GIB.*/E\\s?PFO", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "Provident Fund"],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("ICICI BANK LOAN", na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "Bank Loan"]
    ]

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['merchantType'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")

    conditions_choices = [
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NACH_AD_RTN_CHRG~AD|NACH_AD_RTN_CHRG~INGENOT", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_wave(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("NACH_AD_RTN_CHRG", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_wave(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["UPI","UPI_REVERSAL"]) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bEBA\\b", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CHARGES") == False), sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2).replace(to_replace='\d+', value='', regex=True)], #removenumber
        [transactions.description.str.contains("IIN/I-Debit", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CARD_PAYMENT"), sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^MIN|^RIN/|^IIN|^VIN", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("BILL DESK", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5).replace(to_replace="_.*", value="", regex=True)], #bil onl
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("ONLINE_PAYMENT"), sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)], #ecom pur 
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT_RETURN","RTGS_RETURN"]) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,3,4)], #return
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/INFT/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("/").eq(3)  , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/BPAY.*BBPS|^BIL/BBPS.*BBPS|^BIL/INFT|^BIL/NEFT", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/BPAY|^BIL/RCHG|^BIL/ONL", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/00[12].*/.*/NSP0.*/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^BIL/00[12].*/.*/(?!(NSP))", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3).replace(to_replace='\d+', value='', regex=True).replace(to_replace='-', value=' ', regex=True)],#removeWords(c("Transfer","Na","NA"))
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^NEFT-|^RTGS-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)], #neft
        # [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/NEFT/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)], #inf neft #comment out for this
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/INFT/", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("/").eq(4) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/NEFT/|INF/INFT", na=False, case=False), sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)], #inf neft #only for velocity acc
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^RTGS/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)], #rtgs
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT","RTGS"]) & transactions.description.str.contains("/.*[0]{1,}.*/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["NEFT","RTGS"]) & (transactions.description.str.contains("/.*[0]{1,}.*/", na=False, case=False) == False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("TRFR TO:|TRFR FROM:", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)", index=0)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^TRF/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^CLG/(?!(CHQ|CLG))", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.description.str.contains("iwish", na=False, case=False) , "iWish"],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.description.str.contains("/Transactio/|/Razorpay to ", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],#imps
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS") & transactions.description.str.contains(" to ", na=False, case=False) & transactions.description.str.count("/").eq(3) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],#imps
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("IMPS")  & transactions.description.str.count("/").gt(3) , sep_by_(transactions.description,4,5)],#imps
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^MMT/|^INF/INFT/|^INF/NEFT/",  na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION") == False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)], #mmt & INTRA_ACCOUNT_TRANSFER & neft
        [transactions.description.str.contains("^INF/",  na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.eq("ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION") == False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)], #mmt & INTRA_ACCOUNT_TRANSFER

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH/CTRAZORPAY/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],

        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH/", na=False, case=False) & (transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["TAX_REFUND","INVESTMENT_INCOME"]) == False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,1,2)],
        [transactions.transactionCategory.eq("CMS") , sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],

    ]
    
    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])
    transactions['partyName'] = np.select(df['conditions'], df['choices'], default="")
    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].str.strip().str.title()

    conditions_choices = [

    df = pd.DataFrame(data=conditions_choices, columns=['conditions', 'choices'])

    transactions['partyName'] = transactions['partyName'].str.strip().str.title()

    transactions['party2'] = transactions['partyName'].replace(to_replace=" ", value="", regex=True)

    return transactions

steps.message:
All bugs are confirmed and localized. `"SAVINGS"` appears only at HDFC.py:124; every other reference is `"SAVING"`. Let me record findings and apply the five surgical fixes.

Summary of the four complaints → five injected offsets:

| Complaint | Location | Defect |
|---|---|---|
| 1a. all-numeric reference → cheque deposit, now generic transfer | HDFC.py:100 | `remark.str.len().eq(15)` can never satisfy the 16-char pattern `^[0]{11}[0-9]{5}` (11 zeros + 5 digits) → rule never fires |
| 1b. bare-numeric salary lost its salary tag | HDFC.py:124 | `accountType=="SAVINGS"` — the value is `"SAVING"` everywhere else, so it never matches |
| 2. leading direction-word transfer → wrong/empty payee | ICICI.py:159 | `index=0` extracts the `(TO\|FROM)` group instead of the name group; DCB:80-81 and ICICI:168 use `index=1` for the same 2-group shape |
| 3. slash bill ref (type/sub-type/numref/payee) → lifts numref | ICICI.py:147 | `sep_by_(...,2,3)` takes the numeric-ref field; sibling BIL rule (149) uses `(3,4)` for the final payee field |
| 4. offsetting credit after matching debit → bounce not reversal | HDFC.py:98 | `description.shift(periods=2)` for REVERSAL; every other bank (ICICI, Saraswat, SCB) uses `shift(periods=1)` |

findings.summary: REVERSAL rule compares description to shift(periods=2) instead of shift(periods=1), so a credit immediately following its matching debit fails this rule and falls through to AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE.
findings.failure_scenario: A NEFT/IMPS/UPI/RTGS debit immediately followed by an equal-amount, same-description credit (a reversal) is labelled AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE instead of REVERSAL. All sibling banks (ICICI:49, Saraswat:20, StandardCharted:60) use shift(periods=1).

findings.summary: CHEQUE_DEPOSIT rule requires remark length == 15 but the pattern ^[0]{11}[0-9]{5} needs 16 characters, so the condition can never be true.
findings.failure_scenario: A credit whose remark is a 16-digit all-numeric reference with 11 leading zeros is never tagged CHEQUE_DEPOSIT and defaults to TRANSFER.

findings.summary: Salary rule checks accountType=="SAVINGS" but the account-type value used everywhere else in the app is "SAVING", so the rule never fires.
findings.failure_scenario: A savings-account credit whose narration is a bare 6-digit code (categorized TRANSFER) never gets the SALARY subcategory.

findings.summary: py_extract on pattern 'TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)' passes index=0, extracting the TO/FROM direction word instead of the name group (index=1).
findings.failure_scenario: A transfer with narration 'TRFR TO:JOHN DOE' yields partyName 'To' instead of 'John Doe'. DCB:80-81 and ICICI:168 use index=1 for the same 2-group shape.

findings.summary: BIL/INFT slash rule takes field index 2 (numeric reference) via sep_by_(2,3) instead of the final payee field; sibling BIL rule at line 149 uses (3,4).
findings.failure_scenario: Narration 'BIL/INFT/000123456/Payee Name' (4 fields) yields partyName '000123456' (the numeric reference) instead of 'Payee Name'.

findings.summary: REVERSAL rule compares description to shift(periods=2) instead of shift(periods=1), so a credit immediately following its matching debit fails this rule and falls through to AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE.
findings.failure_scenario: A NEFT/IMPS/UPI/RTGS debit immediately followed by an equal-amount, same-description credit (a reversal) is labelled AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE instead of REVERSAL. All sibling banks (ICICI:49, Saraswat:20, StandardCharted:60) use shift(periods=1).

findings.summary: CHEQUE_DEPOSIT rule requires remark length == 15 but the pattern ^[0]{11}[0-9]{5} needs 16 characters, so the condition can never be true.
findings.failure_scenario: A credit whose remark is a 16-digit all-numeric reference with 11 leading zeros is never tagged CHEQUE_DEPOSIT and defaults to TRANSFER.

findings.summary: Salary rule checks accountType=="SAVINGS" but the account-type value used everywhere else in the app is "SAVING", so the rule never fires.
findings.failure_scenario: A savings-account credit whose narration is a bare 6-digit code (categorized TRANSFER) never gets the SALARY subcategory.

findings.summary: py_extract on pattern 'TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)' passes index=0, extracting the TO/FROM direction word instead of the name group (index=1).
findings.failure_scenario: A transfer with narration 'TRFR TO:JOHN DOE' yields partyName 'To' instead of 'John Doe'. DCB:80-81 and ICICI:168 use index=1 for the same 2-group shape.

findings.summary: BIL/INFT slash rule takes field index 2 (numeric reference) via sep_by_(2,3) instead of the final payee field; sibling BIL rule at line 149 uses (3,4).
findings.failure_scenario: Narration 'BIL/INFT/000123456/Payee Name' (4 fields) yields partyName '000123456' (the numeric reference) instead of 'Payee Name'.

steps.message:
Both files parse, and the extraction logic verifies:
- **Bug 3**: `sep_by_(3,4)` now returns `'Payee Name'` (was the numeric reference at index 2).
- **Bug 2**: `index=1` now returns `'JOHN DOE'` (was `'TO'`, the direction word).

## Summary

All four consolidated complaints traced to five injected boundary/offset faults sitting inside otherwise-correct rules. Each was fixed with a one-token change that only affects the broken edge rows:

**HDFC (`BankScripts/HDFC.py`)** — mango_saver's two reports + the maintainer's reproduction:
- **L98** (reversal vs bounce): `description.shift(periods=2)` → `shift(periods=1)`. The REVERSAL rule was comparing to the row *two* back, so an offsetting credit right after its matching debit failed it and fell through to `AUTO_PAYMENT_BOUNCE`. Now matches ICICI/Saraswat/StandardCharted.
- **L100** (all-numeric reference → cheque deposit): `remark.str.len().eq(15)` → `.eq(16)`. The pattern `^[0]{11}[0-9]{5}` needs 16 chars, so the length-15 guard made the rule unsatisfiable and the credit defaulted to `TRANSFER`.
- **L124** (bare-numeric salary): `accountType=="SAVINGS"` → `"SAVING"`. `"SAVINGS"` was the only occurrence in the whole codebase; the canonical value is `"SAVING"`, so the salary sub-tag never applied.

**ICICI (`BankScripts/ICICI.py`)** — rk_ontheroad and auditlens:
- **L159** (leading direction word): `py_extract(..., index=0)` → `index=1`. With the 2-group pattern `TRFR (TO|FROM):(.*)`, index 0 grabbed the direction word itself; index 1 grabs the name (matching the convention at DCB:80-81 and ICICI:168).
- **L147** (slash bill reference): `sep_by_(...,2,3)` → `(3,4)`. For the 4-field `BIL/INFT/<ref>/<payee>` layout it lifted the numeric reference (field 2) instead of the payee at the end (field 3); the sibling `BIL/BPAY|RCHG|ONL` rule at L149 already uses `(3,4)`.

Each fix converts only the specific malformed edge row to its correct label and leaves rows matched by earlier/other rules untouched, so nothing currently correct shifts.
